intent.summary: Speed-first fact-check / question-answering: triage a question (technology, term/noun, or open factual question) as simple vs complex, fan out PARALLEL web searches, early-exit on corroboration, and return a citation-backed bottom-line answer within a hard wall-clock budget — simple <=2 min, complex <=5 min. Efficiency is the defining requirement.
in_scope: Single-fact lookups (definitions, current value/version/date, entity ID)
Multi-part factual questions; non-English / CJK questions
out_of_scope: Repo/context-answerable questions; creative/math/coding with no external fact
intent.primary_user: A human or agent wanting a fast, sourced answer to a factual question (GPT-Pro-style, speed-optimized).
triggers_observed: quickly find out X / look this up fast

altitude_rationale: Post-build audit of a network-using, reusable skill with a deterministic answer-contract validator and efficiency metrics. Built to full rigor; runtime kept lean (95-line SKILL.md, 22.9% always-loaded) to honor the speed intent.

scorecard.evidence: SKILL.md is a runbook (preflight->triage->parallel fan-out->early-exit->synthesize->self-check->emit); description carries positive + negative + adjacent false-triggers (deep-research, vince-album-review, vince-hifi-review, opinion, repo-answerable). Per-tier budget caps are externalized in rules/triage.md and the output contract is externalized in scripts/check_answer.mjs. (score_skill heuristic says 'partial' only because steps use bold '0-' markers not '1.' and the body avoids the literal word 'trigger'.)

rules/search-protocol.md documents query decomposition, parallel fan-out, snippet-first, bounded iterative deepening (saturation early-exit), conflict triangulation, and claim->evidence; references/source-reliability.md gives Admiralty-lite grading + freshness. Grounded in develop-principle procedures.

26 eval cases: 20 deterministic (evals/run_all.mjs over fixtures/, re-runnable) + 6 behavioral (evals/evals.json). Boundary/adversarial coverage; every adversarial_checklist edge bound (14/14); regression set seeded incl. battery-driven D16-D20.

Real red log (.skill-engineer/red/red.log, 15 FAIL lines incl. idempotency + CLI against a wrong-sentinel stub); green 20/20; two mutation spot-checks recorded (source-bar, body-only traceability). Mechanism in scripts/ imported by the harness (not tautological).

references/metrics.md defines time-to-answer/cost-per-success per tier (simple p50<=2min, complex p50<=5min), claim-traceability rate (100%, enforced by the validator), confident-wrong rate (~0), search efficiency, and activation precision, with a paired-eval measurement method.

SKILL.md 95 lines / ~1.3k tokens; 22.9% always-loaded share; progressive disclosure into rules/ (triage, search-protocol, output-contract), references/ (source-reliability, metrics), assets/ (answer-template), with Modules/Scripts/Assets tables.
CHANGELOG.md (SemVer 0.1.0) with a release gate (validator harness green + behavioral evals pass) and a rollback note; metrics.md doubles as observability guidance.
gaps: Observability is doc-level only (no runtime hooks) — acceptable for a self-contained behavioral skill.

overall_readiness.summary: Post-build pillar-presence audit: all 7 pillars present. A lean, well-tested, source-traceable speed-first fact-check skill. Pillar-presence caps at candidate by policy until the independent behavioral battery passes clean — see the conductor's effective_verdict = min(re_audit, battery).

comparables.what_to_borrow: Differentiation confirmed: bounded/time-boxed BLUF answer vs deep-research's exhaustive report; the description routes report requests away.

recommended_design.trigger: Built: positive (fast factual lookups/verification), negative (subjective/opinion, repo-answerable, creative/math/coding), adjacent (deep-research report, vince-album-review, vince-hifi-review).
recommended_design.protocol: Built: preflight -> triage (simple/complex) -> parallel search fan-out -> snippet-first corroborate -> early-exit on saturation -> one targeted round (complex) -> synthesize BLUF -> self-check -> emit, under per-tier hard caps.
recommended_design.evidence_base: Built: search_fan_out + bounded iterative_deepening + source_reliability_grading + claim_evidence_traceability, grounded in develop-principle.
controls: Per-tier hard budget caps (rounds/width/fetch/source bar) in rules/triage.md
Citation + honesty controls enforced by scripts/check_answer.mjs
Scope control routing reports to deep-research
tests: 20 deterministic harness cases + 6 behavioral cases; 14/14 adversarial-checklist coverage; regression set incl. battery-driven cases
adversarial_checklist: Volatile value → dated source / as-of date
Answer uncited but stray [n] in Sources/Caveats → E_UNSOURCED_CLAIM (loop-1 fix)
CRLF line endings → still parsed correctly (loop-1 fix)

prioritized_actions.action: Optional: add a lightweight runtime observability note (e.g. log tier + tool-call count per answer) if the skill is deployed at scale.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Polish; current metrics doc + validator self-check suffice for a self-contained skill.
